case_title: MICHAEL GEDEON et al VS. JOHN WORTHINGTON et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEDEON, MICHAEL GEDEON, NABIL AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 587 O'FARRELL STREET #7 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., SEE SCANNED DOC;WRIT ISSUES FORTHWITH EXECUTION STAYED TO 5/21/02 AT 5:00 P.M.. PLTFS. WAIVE ALL BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES THROUGH 5/21/02 SO LONG AS DEFT. VACATES ON OR BEFORE 5:00 P.M. ON 5/21/02. IF DEF.VACATES BEFORE 5/21/02 AT 5:00 P.M HE WILL RECEIVE $500.00 CASH ON SURRENDER OF KEYS AND VACANT UNIT. SEE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS SCANNED FOR FURTHER DETAILS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEDEON, MICHAEL GEDEON, NABIL SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-06-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2002 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WORTHINGTON, JOHN
